name: Spatial Transcriptomics
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /var/lib/rstudio-server /var/run/rstudio-server && sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y libglpk-dev && Rscript -e "install.packages(c('Seurat', 'patchwork', 'remotes')); remotes::install_github('satijalab/seurat-data'); SeuratData::InstallData('stxBrain')"
